name: list_collections
summary: Lists accessible collections and their stable collection identifiers
searchable_text: list_collections Lists accessible collections and their stable collection identifiers. This is read-only metadata discovery.  {"properties":{"collections":{"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}

name: describe_collection
summary: Returns field metadata for one collection selected by an observed collection_id

identifier_dependencies.collection_id: A collection identifier returned by list_collections.

searchable_text: describe_collection Returns field metadata for one collection selected by an observed collection_id. Read-only. collection_id {"type":"object"}

name: list_items
summary: Lists a bounded sample of items in one collection

identifier_dependencies.collection_id: A collection identifier returned by list_collections.

searchable_text: list_items Lists a bounded sample of items in one collection. Use an observed collection_id and a small limit. Read-only. collection_id cursor limit {"type":"object"}

name: get_item
summary: Gets one item by an observed stable item_id

identifier_dependencies.item_id: An item identifier returned by list_items.

searchable_text: get_item Gets one item by an observed stable item_id. Read-only. collection_id item_id {"type":"object"}

name: create_item
summary: Creates a new item in a collection and changes persistent workspace state

name: delete_item
